name: cwd-guard
description: Denies any Bash command that hardcodes the current working directory — the project's own absolute path, a path under it, or a $PWD / $(pwd) expansion of it — so the agent addresses files inside the project by a path relative to the root instead. A PreToolUse(Bash) guard; absolute paths outside the project are left alone. Standalone — enable or disable at will.

interface.shortDescription: Reject absolute working-directory paths in Bash
interface.longDescription: A PreToolUse(Bash) guard that denies any command hardcoding the current working directory — the project's own absolute path, a path under it, or a $PWD / $(pwd) expansion of it — so the agent uses paths relative to the project root. Absolute paths outside the project are left alone. Standalone — enable or disable at will.
